reference_answer: Grants clerk Ilya Ren received proposal P-5.
P-5 was filed with status pending eligibility check.
It was assigned to budget review because the match letter was missing.
Eligibility approval was denied for lack of the match letter.
Sponsor letter L-5 corrected the file from no match evidence to match evidence present.
The optional solar-panel line item was withdrawn.
The current status is approved with revised budget.
